recalls.Description: Sauna360 is recalling specific models of their Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid saunas due to a potential fall hazard linked to the bench seating. The serial number for each sauna can be located on the packaging and within the sauna rooms. For Halmstad models 2, 3, and 4, the serial number is found beneath the upper bench on the left side, above the electrical contactor box. For Kiruna Hybrid models 2 and 3, the serial number is on the right wall, under the upper bench's right side. The model number is also available in the user manual. The recall affects a range of model numbers and serial numbers as detailed below.
recalls.Title: Sauna360 Issues Recall for Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid Saunas Over Fall Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach out to Sauna360 at 888-780-4427 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email at us_techsupport@sauna360.com, or visit https://sauna360.com/product-recall or www.sauna360.com and click on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page for further information.

Injuries.Name: Sauna360 has received seven reports of the benches breaking, including one consumer with head and neck injuries.

Retailers.Name: Various distributors across the nation from July 2024 to December 2024, priced between $6,000 and $12,000.

Hazards.Name: Risk of bench collapse leading to falls

Remedies.Name: Immediate cessation of use of the sauna benches and contact Sauna360 for a complimentary repair. A professional installer will retrofit the benches with added hardware, and consumers will receive an updated product manual that specifies the weight limit.

recalls.metaDescription: Sauna360 recalls Tylö Halmstad and Kiruna Hybrid saunas due to a fall hazard. Contact for free repairs and safety updates.
